title: zabach #2076
definition:
1) to slaughter, kill, sacrifice, slaughter for sacrifice
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to slaughter for sacrifice
        1a2) to slaughter for eating
        1a3) to slaughter in divine judgment
    1b) (Piel) to sacrifice, offer sacrifice
